_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA-KG infrastructure cert; validates internal graph invariants, not empirical claims -->
scope_note: QA-KG Consistency Cert family [225]: validates the QA-native memory graph (tools/qa_kg/) itself. Four invariants: (KG1) every Cosmos node has a provenance chain to Singularity via {validates, derived-from, extends, instantiates}; (KG2) no cycles in 'contradicts' edges; (KG3) Theorem NT firewall intact — no archive (Unassigned) → Cosmos causal edges without via_cert mediation; (KG4) orphan Satellite nodes aged beyond policy window (default 30d) flagged for review. Source: QA-MEM architecture spec, memory/project_qa_mem_architecture.md; CLAUDE.md QA Axiom Compliance; Theorem NT (Observer Projection Firewall).
